formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Since the CBSE Class 12 Business Studies chapter on Staffing does not typically involve mathematical formulas, I will provide you with a list of key concepts and statements in the same format. However, I can include some basic numerical formulas related to staffing ratios and productivity. Here's a JSON array with relevant information:

[
  {
    "name": "Efficiency Ratio",
    "formula": "Efficiency Ratio = (Output / Input) × 100",
    "variables": "Output - The quantity produced, Input - The resources used",
    "units": "%",
    "notes": "To calculate the efficiency of a production process"
  },
  {
    "name": "Productivity Ratio",
    "formula": "Productivity Ratio = (Output / Labour Hours) × 100",
    "variables": "Output - The quantity produced, Labour Hours - The hours worked by employees",
    "units": "%",
    "notes": "To calculate the productivity of a production process"
  },
  {
    "name": "Manpower Planning",
    "formula": "M = (N × S × E) / 100",
    "variables": "M - Required Manpower, N - Normal Working Hours, S - Service Hours, E - Efficiency",
    "units": "Manpower (people)",
    "notes": "To calculate the required manpower for a project"
  },
  {
    "name": "Staff Turnover Ratio",
    "formula": "Staff Turnover Ratio = (Number of Employees Left / Average Number of Employees) × 100",
    "variables": "Number of Employees Left - The number of employees who left, Average Number of Employees - The average number of employees",
    "units": "%",
    "notes": "To calculate the staff turnover ratio of an organization"
  },
  {
    "name": "Labor Productivity Index",
    "formula": "Labor Productivity Index = (Actual Output / Budgeted Output) × 100",
    "variables": "Actual Output - The actual quantity produced, Budgeted Output - The budgeted quantity",
    "units": "%",
    "notes": "To calculate the labor productivity index of a production process"
  }
]

Please note that these formulas are not exhaustive, and you should consult your textbook or study materials for more information on staffing ratios and productivity.
